name: Sunny and Traci Vandegriff
text: Tracy has been a blessing to us to be able to open our hearts to not one but two babies after losing our little man Tanner 13 months ago. From the moment we contacted Tracy, she opened her home to us to come meet her and all the precious Yorkie moms. The level of care Lili Cate and Magnolia Claire have been given has been above and beyond. Tracy allowed us to visit and bond with them. She continued to send pictures and videos to us even from the vet visits. They came home already trained to a puppy pad. Tracy Simpson is an EXCELLENT Yorkie breeder and sets the bar over the top with her knowledge and exceptional care of her dogs.

name: The Franks
text: We were looking to bring another dog into our family and could never imagine meeting someone in a nail salon that would bring us to Tracy. From the beginning to end Tracy gave us all the information we needed. I have never seen a breeder send weekly or daily pictures and videos when our precious Enzo was born. She loves each puppy like it was her own. If you are looking for a furever friend, Dutray Yorkies is the best.

name: Jamie D
text: My testimony with Dutray Yorkies is you never say never. I had to let go of my sweet yorkie of 16 years and it was one of the hardest things I ever had to do. Two years later my heart began to yearn for a new baby. When you meet Tracy there seems to be an instant connection, she is so personable and has so much knowledge with Yorkies. She sends pictures the moment the babies are born. One of the things I love most is Tracy opens her home for puppy visits until they are ready to go home at 12 weeks. Our Lucy made the transition amazingly. I could go on and on about all the great things this breeder does. If you are looking at this site look no further, Dutray Yorkies is the best.

name: Gretchen
text: From the moment Tracy lifted up a pup and took a picture of him and said this is Charlie, the great adventure began. The 3 months that we had together was educational and fun. Tracy truly loves her pups and makes sure that each one goes to a good home. She knows each puppy and whether they have been having a good day or whether they are at their best. I am so happy to have been one of the lucky ones to get one of her magnificent pups.

name: Jane
text: I found the website and talked with Tracy on the phone. Tracy was very informative on how she raises her puppies. After the puppies were born and I selected my puppy, I received regular notifications, photos and some video. Tracy asks that you name your puppy so they can become accustomed to being called by name. Tracy's training of the puppies to use their pee pads has made it a stress-free first week. If you are wanting a Yorkie, you could not ask for anyone better than Dutray Yorkies.

name: Amanda
text: The experience we had with Dutray Yorkies was complete opposite of our first with another breeder. From getting pictures of our puppy right after he was born, to being encouraged to visit as much as we wanted in her home, answering every question we could think of. The difference between getting a puppy at 8 weeks and 12 weeks is HUGE! Our 12 week old goes potty on a pad, sleeps through the night, doesn't nip at you. Not only is Tracy a nurturing and loving breeder who truly loves her pups, she is a genuinely great person!

name: Tulles Family
text: After finding Tracy's website I knew my search was complete. It was very clear that this is a woman that not only loves these dogs but also has an incredible amount of knowledge in what she is doing. Savvy has been home with us for 5 days now and Tracy has been just as available to answer my questions as she has been for this entire process. There is no doubt in my mind that I made the right decision choosing Tracy and Dutray Yorkies.

name: Kathy Petty
text: Our empty nest is empty no more. Our first experience with a breeder, Dutray Yorkies, has been wonderful every step of the way. We were kept informed and educated about the proper care for our new fur baby. Tracy allowed me to visit Gracie Lou shortly after she was born and frequently to bond with her before we brought her home. Excellent breeder and caregiver for these precious little gifts from heaven.

name: The Ross Family
text: I have read each and every testimonial posted on Tracy's website. Each and every testimonial is spot on! Tracy is not only a great person, but a super excellent Yorkies caregiver. I picked up Duke and he has been the best little pup ever! He slept through the night immediately and knows how to potty outside already at three months! I highly recommend Tracy and Dutray Yorkies for your next furry family member!

name: Cheryl Dumas
text: I lost my beloved Yorkie and was struggling with the idea of another puppy when I stumbled onto the Dutray Yorkies website. Tracy talked to me for almost an hour and was so personable with me. She is very thorough. She has the pups 90% potty-trained by the time you bring them home. She provides you with a monogrammed goodie bag with everything you need. The puppies have the sweetest temperaments! I love my little Bentley so much we even went and got his brother Milo a few days later!

name: Donna
text: This is Juddar, one of Tracy's fur babies! Juddar is a very smart and interesting fur baby. When Tracy united Juddar and I, he was already pee pad trained and socialized with other pets and very well mannered. He understands come to me, sleeps throughout the night. I would highly recommend Dutray Yorkies for your next family member.

name: Joel and Peggy Romero
text: Anna Lee is absolutely beautiful. She came to us healthy and pre-spoiled. She is friendly, loving, and an outgoing little girl. Tracy was so easy to get to know. I received pictures of my baby several times a week. I felt like I was right with her watching her grow. Tracy is a wonderful breeder. I am so fortunate to have found Dutray Yorkies. I highly recommend.

name: Ann & Cary
text: We had the good fortune of locating Tracy and Dutray Yorkies! We selected our puppy when she was 3 weeks old. Tracy kept us informed on her progress and delighted us with photos and videos. When we picked Thatcher up we were sent home with a lovely bag including treats, toys and information about puppies. We find our little girl is fearless, well socialized, knows her name and is already potty trained. We highly recommend their breeding program.

name: Marcus & Chandra
text: We are the proud parents of a Dutray Yorkie puppy and we couldn't be happier! As first time puppy parents this was a huge benefit to us. Tracy is so sweet and accommodating. We had lots of questions each visit and she patiently walked us through many scenarios. We also received weekly text message updates as well as pictures and videos of our precious boy. The entire process was seamless and fun! This was a 10/10 experience for us.

name: The Carruth Family
text: Tracy is a honest, kind, woman of integrity, and most of all she loves her girls! I could tell she really cared about who her puppies went to. That gave me peace of mind about what kind of a breeder she was. She agreed to let me put a deposit on a 2nd pup so we could still have two little yorkies as part of our family. She allowed me in her home to visit as often as I could. If you're on the fence about a breeder or looking for one, Tracy and Dutray Yorkies will be a choice you won't regret!

name: Jeff & Kim Smith
text: We were very impressed by the testimonials left by previous Yorkie parents which helped us make our decision to go with Dutray Yorkies. Tracy is a small breeder of healthy, sweet, and socialized puppies. She has years of experience, and you can tell she LOVES her adult dogs and those sweet little puppies. We received photos and videos weekly. We can't imagine our lives without Roxy now! We highly recommend Dutray Yorkies.

name: Sraya
text: Tracy is beyond amazing! She allowed me to have multiple visits where I would come to her home and bond with my puppy. My Khaleesi is absolutely perfect in every way! She has the most perfect features and the best personality ever! Not only are the puppies spoiled, they are super trained. Khaleesi came home knowing sit, stay, and come commands, goes potty on a pad, and doesn't nip at you. She even has a bedtime of 9pm! I highly recommend Tracy and Dutray Yorkies.

name: Rich and Connie
text: We recently purchased one of Tracy's Yorkie puppies. He is adorable! Tracy had everything ready for us that we would need to travel from Texas to Florida. He did awesome traveling in the car and our other dog Bella and Eli absolutely love each other. They are best friends now and sleep and play together all the time. Thank you Tracy for breeding such gorgeous loving puppies!

name: Barbara & Sean
text: After searching far and wide for our Parti Yorkie puppy we were so blessed to find Tracy. She was amazing from the very start. Our puppy came to us pee pad trained, loved and pampered, with his new bed, toys, food, AKC papers, and shot records. Tracy and her husband Duke let us visit multiple times as our puppy was growing up and even now she is always available anytime we need her advice. Her puppies are so special that my mom has now reserved one of her puppies!

name: Michelle Cole
text: Having received my newest Yorkie from Tracy was an experience that was so warm and comfortable. She made me feel right at home. My Pippi came home with me paper trained and social. She has done everything right as a breeder. The two I have gotten from Tracy are by far the most mellow and came pee pad trained! Thank you Dutray Yorkies for a wonderful experience! I wouldn't go anyplace else for my next yorkie!

name: Scott and Tina Chambliss
text: Tracy is so welcoming and informative, and she truly loves each and every one of her pups and adult dogs. After seeing how much care and love she gave the pups, we decided to purchase 2 of them. Tracy makes certain all her pups are well loved and socialized with other dogs as well as people. Both completely healthy, happy and beautiful! Tracy has always been very helpful and quick to answer any questions we had. We would not get another yorkie from anywhere else but Dutray Yorkies.

name: The Sobalvarro Family
text: The level of knowledge and care given to our puppy from Tracy and Dutray Yorkies was far beyond what was expected. She is the only breeder that we found that will let you come to her house and see the dogs. We are so pleased with our little Paco, he is absolutely perfect in every way! He uses the potty pad, sleeps throughout the night, eats well, and loves to follow us around. We would never buy a puppy anywhere else!

name: Jen Cauthern-Allen
text: I can't say enough about Tracy's professionalism and knowledge of the breed. She loves her dogs and truly loves breeding and raising them. Tracy had all of Chloe's medical records organized in a folder with AKC records. She had a bag with her name personalized and all of her toys, bedding and toys. She included Royal Canin food and detailed tips and suggestions. I highly recommend Dutray Yorkies.

name: Polly
text: Started my research for a baby parti yorkie. To my surprise Tracy actually answered my phone call, not requiring me to send email. I drove to Texas from Kansas to pick her up but also wanted to meet Tracy. I am not easily impressed but Dutray blew me away how they run this business. Tracy had real attachment to these babies she raises, a tear was shed. I would never purchase another yorkie from anyone except Dutray Yorkies.

name: Sharon and Paul
text: Tracy is an experienced breeder with tons of knowledge, advice and helpful suggestions. We visited Oscar on numerous occasions prior to picking him up at 12 weeks. This bonding experience was awesome! He had all the starter shots upon pickup, an organized folder with shot records, AKC registration forms, a bag of goodies, a blanket with his smell, and a designer carrying bag with his name! We couldn't be happier with our bundle of joy.

name: The Wyatt Family
text: Our family is absolutely in love with our little Libby and Lincoln! I can't say enough great things about Tracy. She is one of a kind and I consider her one of the best breeders around. Her love and compassion shines through as she treats all of her puppies as if they were her forever babies. Tracy, you are a prime example of what all dog breeders should be.
